socialPrompt.title: Stay connected and earn Rewards
socialPrompt.description: Complete the tasks below to receive bonuses. Complete all tasks to receive an exclusive item.
socialPrompt.signUpDesc: Create a free account to sync your game progress across devices. Without an account, your progress is only saved locally and may be lost.
socialPrompt.inviteDesc: Invite up to {{cap}} friends and each time both of you will receive {{amount}} Gold ({{count}}/{{cap}} invited).
socialPrompt.progressComplete: You have finished all tasks. You will soon receive your reward.
socialPrompt.playlightDiscoverRewardLog: You received {{amount}} Gold for discovering games!
socialPrompt.marketingSubscribeLog: You received {{amount}} Gold for subscribing to email updates!
socialPrompt.followRewardLog: You received {{amount}} Gold for following us on {{platform}}!

referral.invitedLog: You invited someone new to this world! +{{amount}} Gold

invite.linkCopiedDesc: Share it with friends to earn {{amount}} Gold each.
invite.tooltip: Invite your friends and both of you will receive {{amount}} Gold. You can invite up to {{cap}} friends. ({{count}}/{{cap}} invited).

invest.title: Invest
invest.infoAriaLabel: Explain investments and the strategy table
invest.luckBonus: +{{pct}} % Success Chance from Luck (included in table).
invest.buildingLuckyBonus2: +2 % Lucky Chance from building level (included in table).
invest.buildingLuckyBonus1: +1 % Lucky Chance from building level (included in table).

tooltip.profit: The profit you gain in case of success.
tooltip.lucky: Chance on success to multiply your profit by {{multiplier}}.
tooltip.loss: The portion of your investment you lose in case of failure.
tooltip.wipeout: Chance to lose your entire investment in case of failure.
tooltip.potentialProfit: Maximum profit you can gain on your investment. Second value is if Lucky Chance hits (profit × {{multiplier}}).

gambler.title: The Obsessed Gambler
gambler.srDescription: Dice game against the obsessed gambler
gambler.rulesTurns: You and the Gambler take turns rolling a dice.
gambler.rulesTotals: Each player's rolls are added up.
gambler.rulesWinLose: If a player reaches the goal exactly, he wins. If he goes over, he loses.
gambler.rulesStand: If the player whose turn it is has more total points than the opponent, he may choose not to roll.
gambler.tutorialIntro: To help you learn the game, the Gambler offers to play {{count}} times without a bet.
gambler.boneDiceIntro: Place your bet. Owning Bone Dice allows you to play two times against the Gambler.
gambler.practiceOutcome: Practice round. No gold won or lost.
gambler.practiceWinRemaining: You won the practice round (no gold at stake). {{remaining}} of {{total}} practice games remaining.
gambler.practiceLoseRemaining: You lost the practice round (no gold at stake). {{remaining}} of {{total}} practice games remaining.
gambler.practiceWinComplete: You won the practice round (no gold at stake). Practice complete — you may place a gold wager.
gambler.practiceLoseComplete: You lost the practice round (no gold at stake). Practice complete — you may place a gold wager.

fullGame.trialDesc: You have reached the end of the trial. The full journey awaits beyond this point.
fullGame.oneTimePurchase: One time purchase. No subscriptions. No microtransactions.
fullGame.featureStory: Dark and challenging story based on your choices
fullGame.signInRequired: Please sign in to purchase the Full Game.
fullGame.progressSaved: Your progress is saved. You can return at any time and continue where you left off.
fullGame.purchaseSuccessfulDesc: Full Game unlocked and activated! You can now continue your journey without restrictions.
fullGame.legalConsent: You get instant access to the digital content after purchase.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.recentCompletionsNote: Only completions from the last 6 months are shown.
leaderboard.usernameTooLong: Username must be 20 characters or less
leaderboard.mustSignIn: You must be signed in to set a username
leaderboard.usernameInappropriate: This username contains inappropriate language. Please choose a different one.
leaderboard.usernameTakenDesc: This username is already in use. Please choose another.

investmentResult.title: Investment Result
investmentResult.luckyChance: Lucky Chance. The gains on your {{amount}} Gold investment are multiplied by {{multiplier}}.
investmentResult.wipeout: Wipeout. You lost your full {{amount}} Gold investment.

cube.completionLog: You have finished this journey. Continue here or start a new game. Maybe in Cruel Mode, if you dare.

share.title: Share your progress
share.description: Save or share an image of your game progress.
share.errorDesc: Something went wrong while generating the image.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.message: If you encounter any bugs, notice translation issues, or have ideas or feedback, I'd love to hear from you.
